question: Poverty line se upar wale households ke liye, state aur urban-rural classification ke hisaab se, average monthly per capita consumption aur total household count provide karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    g.state,
    g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag,
    AVG(p.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_per_capita_consumption,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.household_id) AS total_household_count
FROM fact_household_poverty_metrics p
JOIN fact_household_composition h ON p.household_id = h.household_id
JOIN dim_geography g ON h.geography_id = g.geography_id
WHERE p.below_poverty_line_indicator ILIKE 'No'
GROUP BY g.state, g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY g.state, g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;
